'''Essess''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Essesia system]], located in the [[Darpa sector/Legends|Darpa sector]] of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by eight [[Planet/Legends|planets]].
